subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Baletepo jishimikila jiji jonse jo bayuka.
topics: Bipimo bya ñyingijilo bya ketekelwa kubiwa mo kyafwainwa
Byakulondela mu kusolola kishina mu jishimikila ja mu kanwa ja londololwa mo kyafwainwa.
